title: IIT Madras Is Going Global
description:
IIT Madras just crossed a line no Indian university ever has,

They’re not just sending students abroad.

They’re building IIT Madras itself across global tech hubs.
IITM Global will:
 • Take Indian research to global markets
 • Bring international industry problems into IIT classrooms
 • Help IIT startups scale globally
 • Attract foreign capital into Indian deep-tech

This isn’t expansion.
It’s positioning India as a producer of global knowledge, not just talent.


Follow us on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/fulldisclosure.ig/
